name: Cloudflare Health Checks
description: Cloudflare's Health Checks probes, which monitor customer origin servers from Cloudflare data centers in regions the customer selects. Cloudflare documents a fixed User-Agent format embedding the first 16 characters of the health check ID, and recommends matching on it; its health-checks docs do not tie probe traffic to the published Cloudflare IP lists, so no CIDR recipe is attached.
